title: Literary analysis snippet
text: The author uses repetition as a powerful tool. Phrases like "the wind kept blowing" appear in three separate chapters, suggesting that nature itself becomes a character in the novel.

character_tips.anna: Literary analysis. Quotes inside argument = pro-level English.
character_tips.maxim: Book analysis is the highest-skill school writing.
character_tips.klavochka: Discovering the secrets of a book, my dear 🔍
